mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败。craft.js使用lerna+yarn berry monorepo，yarn install和npm install均报workspace resolution错误（root-workspace not in lockfile），所有子包启动失败。Node 16/18均测试过。

failure.symptom: yarn berry workspace resolution error: root-workspace-0b6124@workspace not in lockfile. lerna run start fails for all packages.
attempted: npm install --legacy-peer-deps + npm run dev (Node 18) - lerna: Cannot find module p-try
npm install --legacy-peer-deps --force + npm run dev (Node 16) - yarn berry: workspace not in lockfile
yarn install (Node 16) - same yarn berry resolution error
